properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: As the Spirit was moving over the waters Spirit, come move over us Come rest on us Come rest on us :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Come down Spirit, when You move You make my heart pound When You fill the room You're here and I know You are moving I'm here and I know You will fill me :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We honor You, Holy Spirit /: And fire and wind, come and do it again Open up the gates, let heaven on in Come rest on us Come rest on us :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And /: come down Spirit, when You move You make my heart pound When You fill the room You're here and I know You are moving I'm here and I know You will fill me :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, we wait, we wait We honor You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, come rest on us You're all we want You're all we want

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Come Just like in the upper room Just like in the upper room You said You would do it You said You would pour out Your Spirit Just like in the upper room
